'''kojadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphoid|xiphoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphoid|xiphoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kojadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojadithi|kojadithi]] || [[word:kojadiji|kojadiji]] || [[word:kojadishi|kojadishi]] || [[word:kojadiki|kojadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojaduthuthu|kojaduthuthu]] || [[word:kojadujuju|kojadujuju]] || [[word:kojadushushu|kojadushushu]] || [[word:kojadukuku|kojadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojaduthu|kojaduthu]] || [[word:kojaduju|kojaduju]] || [[word:kojadushu|kojadushu]] || [[word:kojaduku|kojaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojadufthuf|kojadufthuf]] || [[word:kojadufjuf|kojadufjuf]] || [[word:kojadufshuf|kojadufshuf]] || [[word:kojadufkuf|kojadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojadethe|kojadethe]] || [[word:kojadeje|kojadeje]] || [[word:kojadeshe|kojadeshe]] || [[word:kojadeke|kojadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojadothotho|kojadothotho]] || [[word:kojadojojo|kojadojojo]] || [[word:kojadoshosho|kojadoshosho]] || [[word:kojadokoko|kojadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojadotho|kojadotho]] || [[word:kojadojo|kojadojo]] || [[word:kojadosho|kojadosho]] || [[word:kojadoko|kojadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojadofthof|kojadofthof]] || [[word:kojadofjof|kojadofjof]] || [[word:kojadofshof|kojadofshof]] || [[word:kojadofkof|kojadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfthÃŸf|kojadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfjÃŸf|kojadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfshÃŸf|kojadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfkÃŸf|kojadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kojadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kojadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kojadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kojadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfthÃŸf|kojadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfjÃŸf|kojadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfshÃŸf|kojadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfkÃŸf|kojadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfthÃŸf|kojadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfjÃŸf|kojadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfshÃŸf|kojadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojadÃŸfkÃŸf|kojadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojadÃḊthÃḊ|kojadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kojadÃḊjÃḊ|kojadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kojadÃḊshÃḊ|kojadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kojadÃḊkÃḊ|kojadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojadathatha|kojadathatha]] || [[word:kojadajaja|kojadajaja]] || [[word:kojadashasha|kojadashasha]] || [[word:kojadakaka|kojadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojadatha|kojadatha]] || [[word:kojadaja|kojadaja]] || [[word:kojadasha|kojadasha]] || [[word:kojadaka|kojadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojadafthaf|kojadafthaf]] || [[word:kojadafjaf|kojadafjaf]] || [[word:kojadafshaf|kojadafshaf]] || [[word:kojadafkaf|kojadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kojadasha|kojadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojadshÃḋsha|kojadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojadrosha|kojadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojadmusha|kojadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojadyasha|kojadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojadnkshÃḋsha|gokojadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojadnkrosha|gokojadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojadnkmusha|gokojadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojadnkyasha|gokojadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kojajadasha|kojajadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojajadshÃḋsha|kojajadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojajadrosha|kojajadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojajadmusha|kojajadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojajadyasha|kojajadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojajadnkshÃḋsha|gokojajadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojajadnkrosha|gokojajadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojajadnkmusha|gokojajadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojajadnkyasha|gokojajadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kejÃḊdasha|kejÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kejÃḊdshÃḋsha|kejÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kejÃḊdrosha|kejÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kejÃḊdmusha|kejÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kejÃḊdyasha|kejÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokejÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gokejÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokejÃḊdnkrosha|gokejÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokejÃḊdnkmusha|gokejÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokejÃḊdnkyasha|gokejÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kojfadasha|kojfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojfadshÃḋsha|kojfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojfadrosha|kojfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojfadmusha|kojfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojfadyasha|kojfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojfadnkshÃḋsha|gokojfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojfadnkrosha|gokojfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojfadnkmusha|gokojfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojfadnkyasha|gokojfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
